mapper.select: SELECT chat_room_id FROM chat_room WHERE trip_id = #{tripId} AND chat_room_type = 'WORKSPACE' AND status = 'ACTIVE' FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_room ( chat_room_id, trip_id, region_id, chat_room_type, chat_room_name, status, created_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_ROOM_ID.NEXTVAL, #{tripId}, NULL, 'WORKSPACE', #{chatRoomName}, 'ACTIVE', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

INSERT INTO chat_member ( chat_member_id, chat_room_id, member_id, conn_status, admin_status, joined_at, last_connected_at ) VALUES ( SEQ_CHAT_MEMBER_ID.NEXTVAL, #{chatRoomId}, #{memberId}, 'ONLINE', 'NORMAL', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )

SELECT SEQ_CHAT_MESSAGE_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO chat_message ( message_id, room_id, member_id, message_type, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{chatRoomId}, #{memberId}, #{messageType}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT cm.message_id, cm.room_id, cm.member_id, NVL(m2.nickname, '알 수 없음') AS nickname, m2.profile_image, cm.message_type, cm.content, TO_CHAR(cm.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS created_at FROM chat_message cm LEFT JOIN member2 m2 ON m2.member_id = cm.member_id WHERE cm.message_id = #{messageId}
